message: discoveryProfile.targetRoles and discoveryProfile.keywordsInclude cannot both be blank or missing.
detail: Discovery intent requires at least one search criteria. Neither targetRoles nor keywordsInclude was provided, or both were blank.
remediation: Use the AI Suggester tab to generate role keywords, or provide explicit targetRoles (e.g., 'Senior Engineer') or keywordsInclude (e.g., 'AI,python') values in your discoveryProfile.
